title: Fading Light

sections.label: Intro
lines: (Avoid excessive brightness or reverb effects.)

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: I cry to You in the still of the night,
My soul pours forth its anguished plight.
Shadows rise where the light once burned,
To the depths of sorrow, I’ve returned.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Why have You hidden, why am I lost?
Each step I take, it bears a cost.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Your silence deafens, no solace found,
I’m buried beneath this hollow ground.
Forgotten, forsaken, left to the night,
My prayers dissolve with the fading light.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: I am adrift in an endless sea,
No friend remains to comfort me.
Bound by chains unseen, I fall,
To the void where Your voice won’t call.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Why have You hidden, why am I lost?
Each step I take, it bears a cost.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Your silence deafens, no solace found,
I’m buried beneath this hollow ground.
Forgotten, forsaken, left to the night,
My prayers dissolve with the fading light.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: From the womb to the grave, my song is pain,
A cry for mercy, a plea in vain.
Yet in the dark, a spark may stay,
A whisper of hope to light my way.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Your silence deafens, no solace found,
I’m buried beneath this hollow ground.
Forgotten, forsaken, left to the night,
My prayers dissolve with the fading light.

sections.label: Outro
lines: (Focus on midrange and bass frequencies for a mellow sound.)

epigraph: I have cried day and night before thee
